timeline.name: Spencer Cox
timeline.notes: Appointed by Gov. Herbert. Elected as Lt. Gov. on Herbert's ticket in 2016. Elected Governor in 2020.

timeline.name: Greg Bell
timeline.notes: Appointed by Gov. Herbert to fill vacancy. Resigned October 16, 2013.

timeline.name: Gary Herbert
timeline.notes: Succeeded Gov. Jon Huntsman Jr. who resigned to become U.S. Ambassador to China.

timeline.name: Gayle McKeachnie
timeline.notes: Appointed by Gov. Olene Walker to fill vacancy.

timeline.name: Olene Walker
timeline.notes: Succeeded Gov. Mike Leavitt who resigned to become EPA Administrator (Nov 5, 2003). First woman Governor of Utah.

timeline.name: W. Val Oveson
timeline.notes: Served two terms under Gov. Norman Bangerter.

timeline.name: David Smith Monson
timeline.notes: Served two terms under Democratic Gov. Scott Matheson (split ticket - not yet joint ticket era).

timeline.name: Clyde L. Miller
timeline.notes: First Lt. Gov. of Utah (office created 1975, replacing Secretary of State). Served under Gov. Cal Rampton.
